subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Why Disasters Catch Us Off Guard
description: Learn Why Disasters Catch Us Off Guard in one minute.

hook.text: 93% of Americans live in a disaster-prone area. Most have zero preparation.

buildup.text: Normalcy bias makes us believe disasters happen to other people, not to us.

discovery.text: Psychologists found people underestimate risks they haven't personally experienced.

twist.text: Survivors of past disasters are dramatically more likely to prepare for the next one.

climax.text: Breaking normalcy bias requires deliberate planning—before the disaster proves you wrong.

punchline.text: The best time to prepare was yesterday. The next best time is now.

quiz.question: What psychological phenomenon makes people underestimate disaster risk?
